title: Opening for Software Engineer at BankBazaar

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at BankBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Software Engineer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
